# BuyandShip Nigeria

BuyandShip Nigeria is an international shipping forwarding service that helps Nigerian consumers shop from the USA, UK, and China and receive deliveries at their door in Nigeria.

## What We Do

We provide personal warehouse addresses in the USA, UK, and China. Customers shop on any retailer (Amazon, Walmart, ASOS, eBay, iHerb, Shein, AliExpress, etc.), ship purchases to their BuyandShip warehouse address, and we consolidate and forward shipments to Nigeria.

We also offer a Procurement Service for customers who cannot shop on foreign websites — we buy the item on their behalf.

## Shipping Rates

- **USA to Nigeria**: $9 per pound. Minimum charge $35 (covers up to 4 lbs). Delivery: 7–14 business days.
- **UK to Nigeria**: £9 per kilogram. Minimum charge £45 (5kg minimum). Delivery: 7–14 business days. Electronics and gadgets accepted — receipt must match account name.
- **China to Nigeria**: $10 per kilogram. Minimum charge $30 (3kg minimum). Delivery: 14–21 business days. Phone number +2348029155825 must appear on every China label.
- **Procurement fee**: 5% of item cost, plus standard shipping rates.

## Requirements

- Customers must verify identity with a Nigerian NIN (National Identification Number) or government-issued ID before submitting requests.
- This is required for Nigerian customs compliance.
- Payment is via Paystack (Naira, NGN). Shipping costs quoted in USD or GBP are converted at the current rate at time of invoicing.

## Prohibited Items

Weapons, drugs, hazardous materials, perishable food, live animals, counterfeit goods, and items prohibited by Nigerian customs law.

## Contact

- Website: https://buyandshiptonigeria.com
- Email: admin@buyandshiptonigeria.com
- WhatsApp: +2348029155825
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm WAT
- Location: Lagos, Nigeria
